name: deep both-flow e2e: ride hailing dispatch drives design->decision->codesign->fullstack app (dotnet-aspnet) + IaC build on gcp
command:
printf '%s' '{"complete":true,"answers":{"motivation":"revenue","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","budget_posture":"balanced","data_volume":"large","read_write_pattern":"balanced","data_cadence":"real-time","criticality":"mission-critical","data_sensitivity":"confidential","compliance_regime":"none","scale":"large","consistency_need":"strong","communication_style":"event-driven","integration_scope":"public","workload":"a ride hailing dispatch application"}}' > p.json
printf '%s' '{"stacks":{"backend-api":"dotnet-aspnet","frontend":"blazor","database":"azure-sql"}}' > tc.json
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-session.sh --vision "ride-hailing-dispatch" --profile p.json --out-dir s --now 2026-06-08T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/optimize-options.sh --options s/architecture-options.json --profile p.json --out sc.json 2>/dev/null
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/decision-package.sh --options s/architecture-options.json --scoring sc.json --out dp.json 2>/dev/null
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/codesign-build.sh --requirements s/technical-requirements.json --platform gcp --decision-id d1 --toolchain tc.json --json 2>/dev/null > plan.json
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/scaffold.sh --kind next-saas --target app 2>/dev/null
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-build.sh scaffold --decision-id d1 --pillar reliability --requirements "health_check,automated_failover" --build-dir bd 2>/dev/null
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-build.sh check --build-dir bd --unit d1 2>/dev/null; cbrc=$?
CB=$cbrc node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const tr=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("s/technical-requirements.json","utf8"));const dp=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("dp.json","utf8"));const plan=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("plan.json","utf8"));const concerns=Object.values(tr.pillars).flat().map(c=>c.concern);const units=plan.app_units.map(u=>u.unit);const infra=plan.infra_units.map(u=>u.unit);const be=plan.app_units.find(u=>u.unit==="backend-api");const restApi=concerns.includes("rest_api_gateway");const messaging=concerns.includes("message_queue")&&units.includes("message-queue")&&infra.some(x=>/sqs|pubsub|service-bus/.test(x));const sql=units.includes("sql-database")&&infra.some(x=>/rds|cloud-sql|azure-sql/.test(x));const nosql=units.includes("nosql-database")&&infra.some(x=>/dynamodb|firestore|cosmos/.test(x));const iac=fs.existsSync("bd/d1")&&plan.infra_units.length>=5;const appBuilt=fs.existsSync("app")&&fs.readdirSync("app").length>0;const distributedSystem=restApi&&messaging&&units.includes("frontend")&&units.includes("backend-api")&&sql&&nosql&&iac;process.exit((tr.needs_grounding.length===0&&dp.loop_closed===true&&plan.reconciled===true&&distributedSystem&&be&&be.stack==="dotnet-aspnet"&&appBuilt&&process.env.CB==="1")?0:1);' && echo ride-hailing-dispatch-bothflows-complete 1>&2
